implemented_slice: Added GET /v1/scoring/active-context so clients can compare refresh_token and refresh_generation before reusing graph, score, model or module state.
Activation advances active_analysis_contexts.refresh_token and refresh_generation atomically with the active scoring profile switch.
Activation responses include cache_invalidation.previous_refresh_token, cache_invalidation.refresh_token and affected modules.
Production graph/path context and home model_status now expose active_analysis_context for server-side refresh semantics.
Integration tests assert old refresh tokens are stale and matching refresh tokens are current.
validation_commands: PYTHONPATH=/private/tmp/eei-ruff:/private/tmp/eei-pydeps python3 -m ruff check apps/api/app/domain.py apps/api/app/domain_repository.py tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py scripts/check_database_schema.py scripts/load_seed_catalogs.py
not_closed_scope: Frontend visible modules still read the static analysis contract and are not yet wired to the server active context.
A true cross-view E2E refresh after activation is still required before A205 can be DONE.
Worker-driven data snapshot activation and transactional outbox are still covered by T1304 and later refresh slices.
Scale and soak refresh stability remain T1306-T1307.
rollback: Run scripts/migrate.py downgrade --steps 1 in environments where migration 0006 was applied.
Remove A205 evidence paths from data/acceptance_traceability.csv if this slice is reverted.
Regenerate release artifacts and rerun make verify plus make verify-g2-db.
